title: Python sim: Implement synchronized hopping, channel selection, rendezvous
description: Implement CCP-12 synchronized hopping in lichen/sim/: update Medium, Node, protocol to support multi-channel with shared hop sequence based on SFN/time, rendezvous announcement in beacons/DIO, frequency selection in tx/rx. Per da2q context. Add tests. Use existing test vectors where possible. Parallel with schc/spec.
close_reason: Python sim CCP-12 implemented in specified files with sync hop using hash_32 from test vectors, rendezvous support. Test vectors updated with independent oracles. 3 codereview passes done, python tests and cargo test for identity and schc passed, no dead code. Deps linked to da2q.12 and hash_32 vectors. Verified.
